title: Invincible!
description: finally!! you won't die until you fully load!!!
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d704ad9e373729f7c50f6e030ca9f20e19935fde.png)

**Annoyed of being dead even if you are on encoding or loading terrain screen?**
# SAY NO TO THIS NONSENSE!

Now you need to accept **manually** that you loaded to server
by just **clicking on this tiny little glass block**.

Before this, you are truly INVINCIBLE, that means **noone and nothing can hurt you**

![how menu looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d59c3e890bf40a06f12883be2f511ba7415c544c.png)
# 
p.s hey, i know you love cheesing huh?
just to let you know, mods like InvMove won't help with this >:3
